segments.text: Kazuya ducks in and takes three jabs; the punch fair whiff punish forms, but it doesn't secure the KO.
segments.original_text: くるー潜り込んで弱々3回 剛烈拳空中前差し返しの形にはなるものの逆にね撃墜パー撃墜にはならない
うまい 空Nねーほんま

full_text: Kazuya ducks in and takes three jabs; the punch fair whiff punish forms, but it doesn't secure the KO. Nice nair, seriously!

corrections.original: くるー潜り込んで弱々3回 ゴール県空中前差し返しの形にはなるものの逆のネジパー撃墜にはならない
